Get purchase order details by id

patch.summary: Update purchase order header by id

post.summary: Record supplier payments against a purchase order
post.description: Accepts an array of payment lines, each with its own payment_method_id and amount — enabling split/multi-mode payment in one call. Purchase-return credits are automatically deducted from the payable amount before validation. Updates paid_amount, due_amount, and phar_payment_status on the order atomically. Returns the full updated purchase order including all payments.

201.description: Payments recorded; returns updated purchase order.

400.description: No outstanding balance, payment exceeds due amount, or validation error.

get.summary: List unpaid/partially-paid purchase orders for a supplier
get.description: Returns all purchase orders for the given supplier where due_amount > 0, ordered by date descending. Each row includes total_amount, paid_amount, due_amount, return_amount, and a payments array with existing payment history. Response also includes total_due — the sum of all outstanding balances on the current page.

200.description: Paginated due orders with total_due summary.

post.summary: Create purchase return (purchase_order_id in payload) and deduct stock

get.summary: Get purchase return details by id

patch.summary: Update purchase return; re-applies stock when items change

delete.summary: Soft delete purchase return and reverse stock
Permanently delete purchase return and reverse stock

post.summary: Create a purchase receipt from an existing purchase order

get.description: Returns purchase receipt items for the given product where the linked batch is not deleted and still has quantity_on_hand > 0 (i.e. not fully sold or returned). Each item includes the batch selling_price and available_stock (the batch's current quantity_on_hand).

parameters.name: product_id
parameters.description: UUID of the product to list available receipt items for

get.summary: List receipt items for a product whose batch still has stock available for sale

patch.summary: Update purchase receipt metadata by id

delete.summary: Soft delete purchase receipt by id
Permanently delete purchase receipt by id

get.summary: Stock report (opening, receive, purchase return, sales, closing) over a date range, optionally filtered by category and product

get.description: Returns one row per purchase-order item within the date range. Columns: date, po_number, supplier_name, product_name, category_name, purchase_qty, unit_cost, purchase_amount. Optional filters: supplier_id (company), category_id, product_id. Response includes page-level totals.total_qty and totals.total_amount.

200.description: Paginated purchase line items with aggregate totals.

400.description: start_date is after end_date, or invalid query params.

get.description: Returns one row per completed sales-invoice item within the date range. Columns: date, invoice_number, customer_name, product_name, category_name, sales_qty, unit_price, sales_amount. Optional filters: customer_id (company), category_id, product_id. Response includes page-level totals.total_qty and totals.total_amount.

200.description: Paginated sales line items with aggregate totals.

400.description: start_date is after end_date, or invalid query params.

get.description: Chronological ledger for a single supplier. Each row is one of three transaction types: purchase (debit), payment (credit), return (credit). The balance field on each row is the running net balance (debit − credit). Response also includes totals.total_debit, totals.total_credit, and totals.closing_balance.

200.description: Ordered list of ledger entries with running balance and summary totals.

get.description: Chronological ledger for a single customer. Each row is one of three transaction types: sale (debit), payment (credit), return (credit). The balance field on each row is the running net balance (debit − credit). Response also includes totals.total_debit, totals.total_credit, and totals.closing_balance.

200.description: Ordered list of ledger entries with running balance and summary totals.

get.description: Lists all payments made to suppliers (phar_purchase_payments). Optional filters: start_date, end_date, company_id (supplier), payment_method_id. Each row includes payment_number, supplier_name, po_number, payment_method_name, amount, status, paid_at. Response includes total_amount across the current page.

200.description: Paginated list of supplier payments with a page total.

get.description: Lists all payments received from customers (phar_sale_payments). Optional filters: start_date, end_date, company_id (customer), payment_method_id. Each row includes payment_number, customer_name, invoice_number, payment_method_name, amount, status, paid_at. Response includes total_amount across the current page.

200.description: Paginated list of customer payments with a page total.

get.summary: List all due credit invoices for a customer
Get sales invoice details by id

patch.summary: Update sales invoice header by id

post.summary: Add payments to a completed credit invoice
Complete sales invoice and deduct stock

get.description: Returns a paginated list of sales returns. Filter by status, customer, or originating invoice. Pass `includeDeleted=true` to include soft-deleted records.

post.summary: Create sales return and restore stock
post.description: Creates a return against a completed sales invoice. Stock is immediately added back for every returned item. Provide `sales_invoice_item_id` for each line to link back to the original invoice items.

get.summary: Get sales return details by id
get.description: Returns the full sales return header and its line items.

patch.description: Updates the return header fields. When `items` is provided the existing lines are fully replaced: current stock effects are reversed, then the new lines are re-applied.

delete.summary: Soft delete sales return and reverse stock
delete.description: Marks the return as deleted (is_delete=true, status=cancelled) and reverses the stock that was added back on creation.

delete.summary: Permanently delete sales return and reverse stock
delete.description: Removes the sales return record from the database entirely. If it has not already been soft-deleted, stock is reversed first.

parameters.name: expiry_days
parameters.description: Days ahead to check for expiring batches

today_sales.description: Total sales amount for today (completed invoices)

low_stock_items.description: Products where stock from movements <= minimum_stock

get.summary: Dashboard summary: today's sales amount, total orders, low stock count, expiring soon count
Paginated list of today's completed sales invoices
Paginated list of today's orders (all non-cancelled statuses)
Paginated list of products at or below minimum stock level

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Days ahead to check for expiring batches

get.summary: Paginated list of product batches expiring within N days (default 30)

olderThanDays.description: Delete logs older than N days

purchase_order_id.description: Purchase order the return is created against

items.description: When provided, fully replaces the return lines. Existing stock effects are reversed and the new lines are re-applied.

paid_at.description: When the payment was physically made

payments.description: One or more payment lines — multiple methods allowed in a single call.

paid_at.description: When the payment was physically received

sale_type.description: 'cash' auto-sets paid_amount = total. 'credit' allows partial or zero payment.

payments.description: Payment lines — multiple methods allowed. Replaces paid_amount when provided.

sale_type.description: 'cash' auto-sets paid_amount = total. 'credit' allows partial or zero payment.

payments.description: Payment lines — multiple methods allowed. Replaces paid_amount when provided.
Payment lines — multiple methods allowed. Replaces paid_amount when provided.

paid_amount.description: Simple single paid amount (ignored when payments array is provided)

sales_invoice_item_id.description: Reference to the original sales invoice item being returned

return_unit_id.description: Return unit override — defaults to the original sales unit on the invoice item

return_qty.description: Return quantity in the return unit

unit_price.description: Unit price override for the return — defaults to original invoice item price

sales_invoice_id.description: The completed sales invoice this return is created against

items.description: When provided, fully replaces the return lines. Existing stock effects are reversed and new lines are re-applied.
